recommendations.title: 24 Hours to Live
recommendations.overview: An assassin seeks redemption after being given a second chance at life.

recommendations.title: 9 Bullets
recommendations.overview: A former burlesque dancer turned author discovers a second chance at life and redemption when she risks everything to rescue her young neighbor after he witnesses his parents’ murder. Now on the run from the local crime boss, who happens to be her lo

recommendations.title: Woman in the Dunes
recommendations.overview: A vacationing entomologist suffers extreme physical and psychological trauma after being taken captive by the residents of a poor seaside village and made to live with a woman whose life task is shoveling sand for them.

recommendations.title: Arizona
recommendations.overview: Set in the midst of the 2009 housing crisis, the life of Cassie Fowler, a single mother and struggling realtor, goes off the rails when she witnesses a murder.

recommendations.title: Nightcrawler
recommendations.overview: When Lou Bloom, desperate for work, muscles into the world of L.A. crime journalism, he blurs the line between observer and participant to become the star of his own story. Aiding him in his effort is Nina, a TV-news veteran.

recommendations.title: Forgotten Love
recommendations.overview: A once-respected surgeon who's lost his family and his memory gets a chance at redemption when he reconnects with someone from his forgotten past.

recommendations.title: The Last Deadly Mission
recommendations.overview: A washed-up Marseilles cop (Auteuil) earns a chance at redemption by protecting a woman from the man who killed her parents as he is about to be released from prison.

recommendations.title: A Little Thing Called Love
recommendations.overview: An introverted young girl falls in love with a popular senior. However, as she begins to come out of her shell, she faces several new problems.
recommendations.director: Wasin Pokpong, Puttipong Promsaka Na Sakolnakorn

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Johnny Got His Gun
recommendations.overview: A young American soldier, rendered in pseudocoma from an artillery shell from WWI, recalls his life leading up to that point.
